item.title: CPFC: Crystal Palace F.C. @CPFC · 2min The @eastmamba effect 1 13 711
UNICEF: Sam Lee reposteó UNICEF @UNICEF · 19h UNICEF is outraged by the killing of two drivers of trucks contracted by UNICEF to
item.description:
Sam Lee reposteó UNICEF @UNICEF · 19h UNICEF is outraged by the killing of two drivers of trucks contracted by UNICEF to provide clean water to families in the Gaza Strip.
The victims were killed by Israeli fire in an incident that took place early this morning at the Mansoura water filling point in northern Gaza. Mostrar más De unicef.org 836 14 mil 27 mil 3 M
